content.question: By what year will the shrinking birth cohort arriving at grade-5/7 entry points reduce selective-track application numbers sufficiently to alter competitive selectivity or trigger policy reassessment?
content.reduction_path: Obtain projections of 10-12-year-old cohort size under regional administrative units (counties/cities) where 6/8-year schools are concentrated; cross-tabulate with current application rates and projected urbanization; estimate selectivity-ratio changes year-by-year through 2035
